title: Analysis of differential binding of Nab3 using DBPeaks
author: Granneman, Sander
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This compressed file contains all the DBPeaks source code used for analysing differential binding of Nrd1 and Nab3 to RNA in  Saccharomyces cerevisiae . Included in the folder is test CRAC data (collapsed reads; fasta files), genome annotation files and a jupyter notebook that contains code to analyse the CRAC data.
steps_raw: This compressed file contains all the DBPeaks source code used for analysing differential binding of Nrd1 and Nab3 to RNA in  Saccharomyces cerevisiae . Included in the folder is test CRAC data (collapsed reads; fasta files), genome annotation files and a jupyter notebook that contains code to analyse the CRAC data.
